name: War Room Initialization
description: Initializes a virtual war room for major incident response coordination. Riggs AI generates an executive summary and identifies required responders based on the incident type. A dedicated Slack channel is created with an incident brief posted as the opening message. Key responders (IR lead, SOC analysts, relevant SMEs) are invited to the channel. A Jira epic is created to track all war room activities. A conference bridge link is posted, and the incident commander role is assigned. The war room setup is logged for audit purposes.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Create war room channel, invite responders, and post incident brief and conference bridge

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create incident epic to track all war room activities and response tasks

config.description: Triggers on critical severity incidents that require a coordinated war room response

config.additional_instructions: Generate a concise incident brief suitable for a war room opening. Include: what happened, what is affected, current impact, and recommended responder roles needed (e.g., network, endpoint, identity, cloud).
config.description: AI-powered incident brief generation identifying the situation summary and required responder roles

parameters.initial_message:
WAR ROOM ACTIVATED

Incident: {{trigger_1.alert.title}}
Severity: Critical
Time Opened: {{trigger_1.timestamp}}

--- INCIDENT BRIEF ---
{{analyze_1.summary}}

--- AGENDA ---
1. Situation assessment
2. Assign incident commander
3. Containment strategy
4. Evidence preservation
5. Communication plan

Conference Bridge: {{config.conference_bridge_url}}

All participants: please join the conference bridge immediately.

config.description: Create a dedicated Slack war room channel with the incident brief and agenda as the opening message

parameters.message: You have been invited to an active war room for a critical incident. Please join immediately and review the incident brief above.

config.description: Invite the IR team, SOC analysts, and relevant subject matter experts to the war room channel
Create a Jira epic to track all war room activities, tasks, and decisions

data.label: Post Jira Link to War Room

notify.message:
TRACKING: All war room activities are tracked in Jira Epic {{respond_3.issue_key}}

Please log all containment actions, evidence, and decisions in the Jira epic or as sub-tasks.

config.description: Post the Jira epic link back to the war room channel for easy reference

parameters.note: War room activated at {{trigger_1.timestamp}} for incident: {{trigger_1.alert.title}}. Channel: #war-room-{{trigger_1.alert.id}}. Jira Epic: {{respond_3.issue_key}}. Responders invited. Conference bridge posted.

config.description: Record the war room activation details in the investigation audit trail
War room initialized — channel created, responders invited, Jira epic tracking, conference bridge posted
